title: Legislative Decree No. 7 of 1977 Regarding Statistics and Censuses
summary: Specifies the competent authority for statistics, its powers, data confidentiality duties, and penalties for breach, making it a foundational government data governance instrument despite predating the main research period.

theme_notes.data_privacy.data_governance_open_data: Establishes the statutory framework for official statistics and censuses.

notes: Related instruments: Related to Information and eGovernment Authority statistical functions
